name: 🚨 Emergency Rollback
description: Rollback khẩn cấp. Spinnaker tự đọc version đang chạy — không cần CLI. Operator chọn version rollback ngay trong UI.

stages.name: 🎯 Select Target Version
stages.instructions:
🚨 EMERGENCY ROLLBACK

Service: ${parameters['deploymentName']}
Namespace: ${parameters['environment']}

──────────────────────────────
📦 IMAGE ĐANG CHẠY (tự động đọc từ K8s):

  ${ #stage('🔎 Get Current Running Image')['outputs']['artifacts'].?[type == 'docker/image'][0]['reference'] }

──────────────────────────────
📋 XEM LỊCH SỬ REVISION (annotation deployed-version):

  Spinnaker UI → Infrastructure → Clusters → chọn deployment → xem Annotations

  Hoặc mở terminal:
  kubectl get replicasets -n ${parameters['environment']} \
    -l app=${parameters['deploymentName']} \
    --sort-by=.metadata.creationTimestamp \
    -o custom-columns='NAME:.metadata.name,IMAGE:.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image,CREATED:.metadata.creationTimestamp'

──────────────────────────────
✏️  NHẬP VERSION MUỐN ROLLBACK VỀ bên dưới:
  (VD: louisbui/dev:v1.0.1-bbb2222  hoặc chỉ tag: v1.0.1-bbb2222)

Click Rollback để xác nhận.

manualJudgment.text:
🚨 *EMERGENCY ROLLBACK — Cần xác nhận*
*Service:* `${parameters['deploymentName']}` | *Env:* `${parameters['environment']}`
*Đang chạy:* `${ #stage('🔎 Get Current Running Image')['outputs']['artifacts'].?[type == 'docker/image'][0]['reference'] }`
Vào Spinnaker UI để chọn version rollback về.

stages.name: Notify — Rollback Starting
Notify — Rollback Complete
stages.payload:
{"text":"✅ *ROLLBACK COMPLETE*
*Service:* `${parameters['deploymentName']}`
*Environment:* `${parameters['environment']}`
*Rolled back FROM:* `${ #stage('🔎 Get Current Running Image')['outputs']['artifacts'].?[type == 'docker/image'][0]['reference'] }` ❌
*Now running:* `${ #stage('🎯 Select Target Version')['context']['judgmentInput'] }` ✅
*By:* ${execution['authentication']['user']}

Verify image:
  `kubectl get deploy ${parameters['deploymentName']} -n ${parameters['environment']} -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].image}'`"}
